title: Jonesiopsis pachychila

It belongs to the subfamily Epidendroideae, which comprises over 40,000 species of orchids. Jonesiopsis pachychila is further classified under the tribe Coelogyneae, a diverse group of orchids characterized by their complex inflorescences. Its classification is based on its morphological and molecular characteristics.
